title: Grassy Velvety Jamaican Coconut Pudding
description: A creamy and delicious dessert featuring shredded coconut and a hint of Jamaican flavor. Perfect for kids and diabetics.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the milk, sugar, and shredded coconut.
Add the egg and vanilla extract to the saucepan and whisk until well combined.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the boiling water and salt.
Return the saucepan to the heat and cook for an additional 2 minutes, or until the pudding thickens.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the butter until melted.
Pour the pudding into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or until set.
